sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38675" key="e)pecapata/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπεξ-ᾰπᾰτάω</orth>, <sense id="n38675.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deceive yet more,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0476.tlg001:3:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mnesim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
